info.description: REST API backend for Bible Memory with OpenAPI/Swagger support for frontend client generation.
info.title: Bible Memory API

post.description: Uses AI (Gemini/Groq/Grok with fallback) to generate an impostor-word exercise.

post.summary: Create or refresh a Telegram user

parameters.description: Search in verse text or reference
parameters.name: search

post.description: If no User row exists for telegramId yet, creates a minimal user (same defaults as user upsert) so the verse can be linked. Body must include externalVerseId; other fields are optional.
post.summary: Add verse to My verses or update progress

get.description: Returns all verses waiting in queue, ordered by position. Also auto-promotes from queue if slots are free.
Fetches a pool of verses for the anchor training mode. Returns verse details sorted by mastery level for adaptive training.
get.summary: Get verses for the reference trainer (anchor session)

post.description: Processes training results and awards XP based on outcomes and verse difficulty.
Swaps one active LEARNING verse with another user verse without triggering queue auto-promotion.
post.summary: Atomically replace an active learning verse

get.description: Same selection as GET /api/users/{telegramId}/verses?filter=review; returns a flat array (legacy OpenAPI contract).

post.description: Moves a verse from MY or STOPPED status into the learning queue.

delete.description: Moves a verse from QUEUE back to MY status.

patch.description: Moves a verse to a new queue position, shifting other items.

post.description: Computes mastery, repetitions, next review, and next training mode from rating (SSOT).

get.description: Semantically same as GET /api/users/{telegramId}/verses with filter=catalog; response shape is catalog-only (items + totalCount).

parameters.description: Search in verse text or reference
parameters.name: search

externalVerseId.description: ExternalVerseID identifies the verse being trained.

modeId.description: ModeId is the training mode used: "reference-choice", "broken-mirror", "impostor-word", etc.

results.description: Results are the individual question results from this session.

promotedVerseIds.description: PromotedVerseIds contains any externalVerseIds auto-promoted during this request.
PromotedVerseIds contains externalVerseIds auto-promoted from queue when this step freed a slot.

dueReviewVerses.description: DueReviewVerses: повторение, следующее повторение уже «наступило» — nextReviewAt == nil или <= now (REVIEW_DUE).

learningVerses.description: LearningVerses are in active learning (not yet at mastery threshold for review phase).

reviewVerses.description: ReviewVerses: все стихи в фазе повторения (REVIEW_DUE ∪ REVIEW_WAITING).

waitingReviewVerses.description: WaitingReviewVerses: повторение, но следующее повторение только впереди — nextReviewAt > now (REVIEW_WAITING).

contextPromptText.description: Context: соседний стих для режима «Контекст» закрепления.

text.description: Text/Reference подставляются при ответе API (Helloao), не из БД.

newTotalXp.description: NewTotalXP is the user's total XP after this session.

xpAwarded.description: XPAwarded is the amount of XP earned in this session.

minRequired.description: MinRequired is the minimum number of verses recommended for a session.

totalCount.description: TotalCount is the total number of verses available in the pool.

verses.description: Verses is the pool of user verses available for training.
